summary: Iteration 4 — Backend (standings, topscorers, cards-per-game cap with idempotency + Final special cap) all 12 pytest tests PASS. Frontend MatchRow Sofascore-style layout verified: grid 60px/1fr/40px/28px, 184 rows render, all required data-testids present, 15 live matches show #FF3D52 RED status+scores with class 'live', 62 finished matches show 'FT' in muted slate-400, upcoming matches show '-' for scores and no match-status element. Regression: /predictions, /fantasy, /worldcup-hub, /match/{id} loaded without console errors. CRITICAL BUG: Favorite star POST/DELETE call wrong URL — MatchRow.jsx hits /api/me/favorites/match/{id} but backend exposes /api/users/me/favorites/match/{id} (profile router has prefix='/api/users').

ui_bugs.issue: POST/DELETE /me/favorites/match/{id} returns 404. Backend route is mounted under /api/users prefix (profile.py line 7: APIRouter(prefix='/api/users')). MatchRow.jsx lines 68-69 use `/me/favorites/match/${m.id}` which resolves to /api/me/favorites/match/{id} — missing '/users' segment. Fix: change to `/users/me/favorites/match/${m.id}`.

integration_issues.issue: All star clicks 404. UI doesn't visibly update either (no error toast surfaced).

action_items: Fix MatchRow.jsx FavStar URLs: change `/me/favorites/match/${m.id}` to `/users/me/favorites/match/${m.id}` on both POST (line 68) and DELETE (line 69). Add user-visible error handling (toast) so failures aren't silent.
Optional: spec referenced /football route, but no such route exists ('No routes matched location /football'). Matches render at root /. Consider adding /football route or update spec.
Consider adding visual fav-active state (filled star) — currently class stays 'cp-fav-cell ' with no aria-pressed change visible.
critical_code_review_comments: FavStar onClick toggles optimistically without rollback on API failure — 404s leave UI in inconsistent state.
Backend /api/cards/use enforces caps correctly and is idempotent; SPECIAL_CAPS round:final is case-insensitive as designed.
Standings ingestion fix (type_id 187=points, 179=goal_diff) verified — Egyptian Premier League returns 18 rows all with non-None numeric fields.
Topscorers endpoint returns expected shape; sm-l-1122 (Copa Libertadores) returns 200 with possibly empty scorers (off-season acceptable).
MatchRow.jsx line 68-69 missing '/users' prefix on favorites — same pattern likely exists elsewhere if other components hit /me/* paths; recommend a quick grep audit.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (layout + live indicator + regression OK; favorite toggle broken)

test_credentials: admin@cloudypitch.com / CloudyAdmin2026! (note: admin doesn't have starter cards; we use a fresh signup user instead — see test_iteration4.py)
seed_data_creation: Tests create a fresh signup user per pytest module (TEST_iter4_<timestamp>@example.com) to get the 5-card starter pack. card_usages collection is auto-populated by /api/cards/use calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes MatchRow.jsx favorites URL, re-test by logging in then clicking a star — expect POST 200 + class change + reload persistence via /api/users/me/favorites GET. Backend test_iteration4.py is fully reusable as regression suite. The /football route was missing — confirm what spec intends.
rca of the issue: Profile router mounted at prefix='/api/users' (backend/routes/profile.py:7). All favorites endpoints live at /api/users/me/favorites/*. MatchRow.jsx FavStar uses relative '/me/favorites/...' against axios baseURL '/api', producing /api/me/favorites/... → 404. Reproduce: signin → root '/' → click any [data-testid^=fav-] → Network tab shows POST /api/me/favorites/match/{id} 404. Mitigation: prefix URL with '/users' in MatchRow.jsx (one-line fix on lines 68 and 69).
